## Week in Review: 2026-03-11 to 2026-03-17

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 16.0.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

- **One Nation**: Avg interest 16.0 (+0.9% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.11)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.1 (-50.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Reason**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
